company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound & Primary Care Diagnostic, LLC
intended_use: The Voluson SWIFT, Voluson SWIFT+ is a general-purpose diagnostic ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals that are legally authorized or licensed by law in
intended_use_full: The Voluson SWIFT, Voluson SWIFT+ is a general-purpose diagnostic ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals that are legally authorized or licensed by law in the country, state or other local municipality in which he or she practices for ultrasound imaging, measurement, display and analysis of the human body and fluid. Clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics; Abdominal (including renal and GYN/Pelvic); Pediatric; Small Organ (Breast, Testes, Thyroid, etc.); Neonatal Cephalic; Adult Cephalic; Cardiac (Adult and Pediatric); Peripheral Vascular (PV); Musculo-skeletal Conventional and Superficial; Transrectal(including Urology/Prostate) (TR); Transvaginal (TV).
target_condition: Follicle measurement in ovarian ultrasound imaging (reproductive/fertility assessment)
ground_truth: Manual measurements by clinical experts; curation protocol developed by clinical experts with senior sonographer review of random subset of curated dataset
other_metrics: Success rate of Auto-Caliper feature: 70% or higher; measurement deviation from manual measurements was calculated to obtain accuracy
